South Korea's Annual Inflation Rate Confirmed at 2.2% for March 2026 | NO | HIGH confidence**

signals.headline: Solana ETF Inflows Continue on April 16 | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
Solana ETF Inflows Continue on April 16 | YES | HIGH**  
U.S. spot Solana ETFs recorded $5.04 million in net inflows on April 16, 2026, following $5.36 million the prior day, with cumulative net assets reaching $835 million; this signals sustained institutional demand amid Solana's price surge to ~$87 (up 6.3-10%)[1][4].
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 17, 2:00PM-2:15PM ET

signals.headline: Tether Backs Drift Protocol Relaunch with $150M Recovery Plan | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
Tether Backs Drift Protocol Relaunch with $150M Recovery Plan | YES | HIGH**  
On April 16, 2026, Tether committed $147.5-150M to recover user funds after a $285M exploit on Solana's Drift protocol, expanding USDT's role and boosting stablecoin supply 15x with $3.8B inflows[4].
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 17, 2:00PM-2:15PM ET

signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Token Holders in April | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Token Holders in April | YES | MED**  
Solana reached an all-time high of ~167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions as of April 14, driven by user growth and anticipation for the Alpenglow upgrade slashing finality to 150ms[2][3][5].
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 17, 2:00PM-2:15PM ET
